title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node, Deno, and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user) installable via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async Rust crate providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like code-completion service powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app demonstrating streaming responses from Ollama over fetch-event-source.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server via slash commands.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI with readline history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that offers code explanation, generation, and chat via Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin enabling local AI summarization and Q&A on your vault.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private LLM conversations.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package providing Ollama model backends for the admin interface and generic views.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI built with Qt6 offering model management and chat windows.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-microsoft-bot
summary: Microsoft Semantic Kernel sample showing how to plug Ollama models into enterprise bot flows.
